<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="apps/app/src/pack/examples/sv-helm/sv-validator-values.yaml" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-literal-marker-apps-app-src-pack-examples-sv-helm-sv-validator-values-sv-participant-pruning-schedule-start" location="stringMarker:SV_PARTICIPANT_PRUNING_SCHEDULE_START-&gt;SV_PARTICIPANT_PRUNING_SCHEDULE_END" -->
```yaml
  participantPruningSchedule:
    cron: 0 /10 * * * ? # Run every 10min
    maxDuration: 5m # Run for a max of 5min per iteration
    retention: 30d # Retain history that is newer than 30d.
```
